top_signals.title: US and Iran Sign Interim Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: President Trump has signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, speeding up the timeline for the agreement to go into effect. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran sign deal as Trump vows to release frozen funds and ease sanctions
top_signals.summary: President says Iranians will receive incentives when they ‘behave’ and acknowledges Tehran will keep ballistic missiles
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Middle East peace deal could herald oil glut next year, says IEA
top_signals.summary: ‘Gradual’ return of flows will give way to sharp rise in production, outstripping forecasts for increased demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU grants Ukraine access to cybersecurity reserve for major attacks
top_signals.summary: As Kyiv takes steps toward formal accession to the EU, the bloc is integrating Ukraine with its pool of pre-approved cybersecurity incident response companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Chase cuts off Anthropic access for its Hong Kong staff
top_signals.summary: Bank follows Goldman Sachs in preventing use of Claude in Asian financial hub
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Warner warns of CISA cuts, staffing gaps in letter to acting chief
top_signals.summary: Warner on Tuesday also wrote a letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin, underscoring that DHS must prioritize CISA and pay for the MS-ISAC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s how a levy on assets could work, just don’t call it a wealth tax
top_signals.summary: Debate around wealth taxes have become a meme, far too ideological and not technocratic enough. But there is a way to raise a levy on assets without distorting the economy, says Tim Sarson Last week I was scanning the list of topics I’d written about for City AM in the last two years and there [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
